content:
Member-only story

3 min read
Just now

--

Coinbase, one of America’s biggest and most public crypto companies, just did something quietly revolutionary.
They’re using more tokens than ever… but paying half as much. Welcome to the real AI war.
They defaulted their engineers to Chinese AI models GLM 5.2 (from Zhipu AI) and Kimi 2.7 (from Moonshot AI) and slashed their internal AI spending by nearly 50%.
They’re consuming more tokens than ever before, but paying roughly half of what they were paying the so-called pioneers of Western AI.
This isn’t some small startup cutting corners.
This is a major U.S. public company choosing Chinese models over OpenAI and Anthropic for day-to-day engineering work.
The CEO, Brian Armstrong, is completely open about it.

No token limit Just a rule
Armstrong explained the philosophy clearly, there are no hard token caps.
